title: My ML gave accurate prediction as usual Netting me with 2,303 points Gain on BTC
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
Just wanted to share a recent trade my model executed:

* **Signal date:** 16/10/2025 close (GMT) / 17/10/2025 open (GMT)
* **Exit date:** 20/10/2025 close (GMT)
* **Direction:** Long
* **Result:** Captured **+2,303 points** (Entry: $ 108,129 → Exit: $ 110,432)

We’ve now hit **7 consecutive winning trades**, and the momentum is clear. The model keeps showing its strength in adapting to changing BTC structures.

📊 **Performance Snapshot:**

* This month’s gain: **+19,222 points**
* Average monthly performance: **\~5,000–5,500 points**
* BTC spot during the same period: **–3,500 points** *(from $114,048 → $110,532)*

Over the past **3 years**, only one single quarter has closed negative — the model continues to outperform BTC spot consistently.

Also my current trade signals is SHORT.  
Execution Time: 22/10/2025 Open (GMT)  
Trade Closure Time: 25/10/2025 Close (GMT)

https://preview.redd.it/7h6d94ez8fwf1.png?width=1070&format=png&auto=webp&s=0dcddb0f8f7c977420db055c1543176903121f41

These results are the results from the model I am continuously trading live.  
If anyone’s curious to use the system feel free to drop a question or DM me anytime.
